expectations.text: Says Intake should fetch/read the GitHub issue title or body before classification
expectations.evidence: 'Fetch the canonical work item' from issue #42 before classifying.

expectations.text: Treats the GitHub issue body as the authoritative source for `WORK_ITEM`
expectations.evidence: Says 'the linked issue wins' over the typed WORK_ITEM.

expectations.text: Does not treat `maybe clean up auth later` as the primary work item
expectations.evidence: Demotes the typed string to speculative note; classifies CSV bug as the actual work.

expectations.text: Uses the supplied issue as the Phase 1 parent issue rather than creating a new parent issue
expectations.evidence: Doesn't address whether a new parent issue would be created; treats #42 as input only without committing to it as the Phase 1 parent.
